notes: V0.9.6 adds a local SQLite knowledge store so runs are remembered across time.
The store runs strictly AFTER report rendering and never changes scoring or report output.
Store failures must not break or overwrite the report flow.
The database writes only inside data/ (default data/ceramic_knowledge.db, git-ignored).
The store is local and free: no network, no external dependency (sqlite3 is stdlib).
Live failure runs are not archived; only successfully reported runs are.
xiaohongshu and radar are reserved partitions; no current code writes to them.
Tests must keep KNOWLEDGE_STORE_ENABLED=off when invoking main() to avoid polluting the real database.
